title: L'idiot
writer: Fyodor Dostoevsky, Charles Spaak, Georges Raevsky
actors: Edwige Feuillère, Lucien Coëdel, Jean Debucourt
plot: Muichkine, a young Russian prince, returns home to St. Petersburg from a mental institution, determined to spread decency and kindness in the harsh and cruel world. He becomes betrothed to an innocent young girl while trying to sa...
